name: Onoff AG
summary: Onoff AG operates as an independent systems integrator and service provider for the value chain in process automation and utilities. The company offers integrated automation solutions comprising control panel construction and assembly, process automation, service, and maintenance; automation solutions in the areas of water and waste-water technology; IT infrastructure solutions, such as planning, installation, and administration of systems, including servers and networks to clients with the associated applications; and MES and intelligent IT solutions that network people, functions, hierarchical levels, systems, and locations. It serves pharmaceuticals, chemicals, food and beverages, oil and natural gas, water and waste-water, energy and environment, and mechanical and plant engineering industries. Onoff AG was incorporated in 2016 and is based in Wunstorf, Germany.
